chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6359 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.27423/2020 2. For hearing of CMA No.27243/2020 (stay) 3. For hearing of main case 05-05-2025 None present for the petitioner. Syed Mohsin Ali Shah, advocate holds brief for Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondents. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General This petition is pending since 2020 without any progress. Diaries demonstrate that Petitioner’s counsel has not appeared since 12.02.2021. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
